code: import api from'./api';const cardService={async getCards(){const response=await api.get('/cards/');return response.data;},async getCard(id){const response=await api.get(`/cards/${id}/`);return response.data;},async createCard(data){const response=await api.post('/cards/create/',data);return response.data;},async freezeCard(id){const response=await api.post(`/cards/${id}/freeze/`,{action:'freeze'});return response.data;},async unfreezeCard(id){const response=await api.post(`/cards/${id}/freeze/`,{action:'unfreeze'});return response.data;},async addFunds(id,data){const response=await api.post(`/cards/${id}/fund/`,data);return response.data;},async getCardTransactions(id){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const response=await api.get(`/cards/${id}/transactions/`,{params});return response.data;}};export default cardService;
